name: LED GIANT FLOOD LIGHTS CCT SELECTABLE 150W/240W/300W
description: Illuminate expansive areas with our High Power LED Flood Lights, offering 150W, 240W, 300W of powerful, energy-efficient lighting. Designed for durability and high performance, these fixtures are ideal for sports fields, warehouses, building exteriors, and commercial spaces, delivering bright, uniform illumination that enhances visibility, safety, and energy savings. Key Features: Soft, Glare-Free Illumination: Uniform light output that is gentle on the eyes and ideal for large areas. High-CRI Seoul Semiconductor Chips: Ensure accurate color rendering and vibrant visibility. Eco-Friendly: Free of mercury and hazardous materials; no UV or IR emissions. Outdoor Rated: Built to withstand harsh environments with IP65 waterproof protection . Wide Voltage Compatibility: Operates on 100–277VAC , suitable for most commercial electrical systems. Premium IP65 Driver: Ensures long-term reliability and consistent performance. High Energy Efficiency: Reduces energy consumption by 60%–80% compared to traditional lighting. Long Lifespan: Rated for 50,000 hours of use, minimizing maintenance costs. Ideal Applications: Perfect for a variety of outdoor settings, these high-power LED flood lights are ideal for sports fields and arenas, offering bright, wide-area coverage with excellent clarity. They enhance safety and productivity in warehouses and loading docks, improve security and curb appeal for commercial buildings and exteriors, and provide reliable, energy-efficient lighting for large outdoor areas.
short_desc: Product Specifications: Models Available: 150W, 240W, 300W Power Wattage: 150W / 240W / 300W Color Temperature: 5700K Lumen Output: 150W: 18,750 lm 240W: 30,000 lm 300W: 37,500 lm Efficacy: 125 lm/W Input Voltage: 100–277VAC IP Rating: IP65 (Outdoor Rated) Lifespan: 50,000 hours Certifications: UL / DLC Warranty: 5 Years Housing: Aluminum Alloy + Steel+ PC Housing Color: Black
